text:
In the first scene, I feel detached and curious, observing a group of people in a glass room, as if peering into a world separated from mine by more than just glass. There is a sense of anticipation and perhaps a hint of isolation.

In the second scene, the vibrant colors and bold letters of "R+D" fill me with a sense of possibility and experimentation. The words about confusion and clarity resonate deeply—my vision feels clouded both literally and metaphorically, reminding me of the tenuous nature of perception and understanding. I am drawn into contemplation about how easily focus can be lost, and reality can become a blur, both visually and philosophically.
